wins.text: I've been coding since I was 12
I learnt to code by myself
I have a full head of hair
I don't drink or smoke
I don't drink coffee
I have all my teeth
I moisturize
I sleep enough sometimes
I eat my vegetables
I now have perfect vision (after having a power of -10 in both eyes)
I have a job
I am a Senior Art Director
I have friends
I actually enjoy talking to my parents
I live alone
I have my own house
I live in a house called the White House
I have lived by myself since I was 9
I am unmarried at 29
I built a talking husband out of a money plant
I dated 13 men in a single month
I built a game where men can win a date with me
A man tried to marry me when I was 4 but I beat him up
I grabbed an old man's butt when I was 4
I sleep next to a life-size Madara cutout
I can drive
I can parallel park
I can drive through Bangalore traffic
My plants are still alive somehow
I jive
I go to the gym
I drink 2l of water every day
I pushed a bully down the stairs in kindergarten
I once painted a road
I once flew an airplane
I caught 2 fish in 10 seconds
I know all the countries and their capitals
I won a ludo tournament
I am a popular horror fiction author online
I do 1000-piece jigsaw puzzles for fun
I won a hackathon
